title: Ethan's Collection of Simple Mods
description: Collection of mods including notably Tectonic & Create. In addition to an array of animation focused resource packs and QOL + optimisation mods.
body:
**This is Ethan's Collection of Simple Mods**

A collection of mods made for server usage and distributed using the modrinth app. The most notable inclusions are:

WIP

# [FreshAnimations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
![Fresh Animations Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1428c4bc74e6963da43ed136b3ef6b2850cb9472.webp)

As well as other minor mods that aim to produce a more immersive playing experience. This includes but is not limited to; [Camera Overhual](https://modrinth.com/mod/cameraoverhaul), [Detailed Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detailed-animations), [Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll), [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc), [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps), [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi), [Vanilla Refresh](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-refresh) and [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) & [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap).

# Important Info
Made specifically for Fabric 1.20.1.
